semantic.role: Vitest configuration file defining test runner settings and timeouts for the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Configures Vitest test runner inclusion patterns to target test and benchmark files in the 'tests' directory.
Sets global test execution timeout to 60 seconds for all test suites.
Sets global hook timeout to 20 seconds for setup/teardown operations.
Exports the configuration for consumption by the Vitest test runner.
invariants: Must export a default configuration object compatible with Vitest's defineConfig.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize and standardize test runner configuration for the project.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No code changes indicated in this analysis; the recent git commit intent (increasing timeouts) aligns with the existing configuration's purpose.
